title: Refactor build_path to use Path.join/1
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.ListUtils.build_path/1` from test_fixtures/non_tail_recursive.ex. The current implementation concatenates `"/" <> segment` in a rebinding loop that doesn't actually work. Rewrite as `segments |> Enum.map(&("/" <> &1)) |> Enum.join("")`, or better use `Path.join/1` if the segments don't already contain slashes. Use the Enum.map+join form because the test expects leading-slash segments. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.ListUtils do ... end` with just build_path.
tier_rationale: Recognizing the non-mutation bug in `for segment ... path = path <> ...` is the key insight.
